# Mandate registration post loan

: Ranjan kumar Singh
Created time: January 8, 2025 5:11 PM
Status: Not started
Last edited: February 19, 2026 7:12 PM
Owner: Lalit Bihani

# **What problem are we solving?**

We need to allow user to update the mandate post loan application completion

Below are the reason due to which we need to ask or allow user to add new mandate or update mandate details

TCL:

- Registration unsuccessful after confirmation
- User cancelled mandate
- Bank account blocked/frozen
- Mandate registered with wrong details like mandate limit amount
- User want to change Bank and mandate

BFL:

- Everything in TCL
- User opted for physical and mandate registration rejection/unsuccessful

DSP: 

- Everything in TCL and BFL
- User skipped the mandate step

Mandate presentation bounce count with reasons (OCT, NOV, DEC 2024):

| **Mandate presentation failure reasons** | **Count [Oct + Nov+ Dec]** | **Is reregistration required?** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Balance Insufficient | 229 + 638 | Yes [if failed for last 3 month] |
| INSUFFICIENT FUNDS | 212 | Yes [if failed for last 3 month] |
| A/c Blocked or Frozen | 6 + 43+58 | Yes |
| Invalid UMRN or Inactive Mandate | 4 + 17+11 | Yes |
| ECS MANDATE NOT RECEIVED | 4 + 12 | Yes |
| REFER TO DRAWER | 3 + 5 | Yes |
| PAYMENT STOP BY DRAWER | 2 + 11 + 8 | Yes |
| Account Closed | 2 + 15  + 19 | Yes |
| INVALID ACCOUNT NUMBER | 1 + 4 | Yes [if failed for last 3 month] |
| MANDATE EXPIRED | 1 + 3 | Yes |
| Account Frozen/Blocked | 1 + 4 | Yes |
| A\C CLOSED | 1 +1 | Yes |
| Registration is Not Found | 1 + 2 | Yes |
| Amount is greater than Mandate Amount | 5 | Yes |
| Customer to refer to the branch | 2 | Yes |

## Meeting notes

- Should we allow user to add multiple bank account?
    - Should we allow user to mark primary for withdrawal and for mandate
- Should we allow user to delete added bank accounts

Total - 500 was there

now 200 - they asked mandate link from lender and sent to customer
